The answer eliminated the inner loop entirely! `tmp += i` 60 times → `indvars.iv += 60` then `udiv 60` (loop strength reduction). Inner loop replaced with single computation.

Implementing loop strength reduction is too complex for now. Let me focus on other low-scoring cases.
